ddls:
CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area (e.g., Barking and Dagenham, Barnet) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "geographical_area_sq_km" REAL /* Geographical area in square kilometers */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region to which the area belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Domestic, Industrial) */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sector */,
  "sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector category (e.g., Residential, Commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuels" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type (e.g., Electricity, Gas) */,
  "fuel_source" TEXT /* Source of the fuel (e.g., Renewable, Non-renewable) */,
  "carbon_emission_factor" REAL /* Carbon emission factor per kWh */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year (e.g., 2017, 2018) */,
  "fiscal_year_start" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel type */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "kwh" REAL /* Energy consumption in kWh */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., Government Report, Utility Company) */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data is an estimate */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., LEGGI, Regular) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_fuel_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_id") REFERENCES fuels ("fuel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)
column_names: Name of the area (e.g., Barking and Dagenham, Barnet)
ID of the region to which the area belongs
Name of the sector (e.g., Domestic, Industrial)
Unique identifier for each fuel type
Name of the fuel type (e.g., Electricity, Gas)
Source of the fuel (e.g., Renewable, Non-renewable)
Start date of the fiscal year
End date of the fiscal year
Unique identifier for each data point
Date when the data was recorded
Source of the data (e.g., Government Report, Utility Company)
Flag indicating if the data is an estimate
